signals.npcLine: Crypto tides churn; whispers of shifting powers crack the net.
signals.questPulse: Seek vault codes before the cries fade into static.
signals.worldFeed: Market pulse shows slight rise amid shadowy fear grounds.
signals.clueEvent: Unmarked nodes flare near forgotten datacenters at midnight.

signals.npcLine: OPG circuits humming; interference could mean extraction or ambush.
signals.questPulse: Monitor OPG frequency spikes; signals may lead to black ops.
signals.worldFeed: Cryptic echoes around OPG stocks; trust no broker’s word.
signals.clueEvent: Anomaly detected in OPG data flow; trace the source fast.

signals.npcLine: RAVE node pulses erratically; something buried beneath bright code.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt rave transmissions to expose hidden asset movements.
signals.worldFeed: RAVE frequencies spike with unknown signals; opportunity or trap?
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter around RAVE hotspots; decryptors in demand.

signals.npcLine: Asteroid markets surge like shooting stars—black ops hungry.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate asteroid mining data streams; secret payloads in orbit.
signals.worldFeed: Asteroid trading fronts heat up; gangs stake claim to ores.
signals.clueEvent: Mining rigs sending stealth signals; treasure or trap unknown.

signals.npcLine: Silent pengu vendor trades in digital ice; secrets colder than steel.
signals.questPulse: Find the PENGU contact before cyberwolves do.
signals.worldFeed: PENGU activity spikes in undercity; traders whisper of new tech.
signals.clueEvent: Frozen payloads appear in PENGU message logs; decode quickly.
